title: Davison, Dehenna - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State for Levelling Up - Department of Levelling Up, Housing and Communities
body: "Ms Davison left her role as Parliamentary Under Secretary of State for Levelling Up in September 2023.  My Death, My Decision The Chair of ACOBA wrote to Ms Davison about her failure to seek advice in relation to joining My Death, My Decision as a Freelance Senior Political Officer. Read the correspondence between Ms Davison and ACOBA about the breach here. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  ACOBA wrote to the Cabinet Office reporting a breach of the Rules. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  "
